ogTitle: Wallu vs Wallumbilla North: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wallu and Wallumbilla North.
heading: Wallu vs Wallumbilla North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wallu, Queensland and Wallumbilla North, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wallu has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Wallumbilla North (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wallu or Wallumbilla North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wallu has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Wallumbilla North scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wallu scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Wallumbilla North scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wallu or Wallumbilla North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wallu has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
